extDescription.message: Render text/markdown responses and .md files as GitHub-styled Markdown. Light/dark theme. Toggle raw view anytime.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown on the Chrome Web Store card, chrome://extensions, and toolbar icon tooltip. Hard 132-char limit per locale.

popupThemeLabel.description: Section label above the theme picker in the toolbar popup.

popupThemeAuto.description: Theme picker option: follow the operating-system color scheme.

popupThemeLight.description: Theme picker option: force light theme.

popupThemeDark.description: Theme picker option: force dark theme.

popupCurrentPageLabel.description: Section label above the per-page render toggle button.

popupShowRaw.description: Button text: switch from rendered HTML to the raw markdown source view.

popupShowRendered.description: Button text: switch from raw source back to the rendered HTML view.

popupStateRendered.description: Status note under the toggle button when the page is rendered.

popupStateRaw.description: Status note under the toggle button when the page shows raw source.

popupNotMarkdown.message: Current page is not Markdown. Open a .md file or a page with Content-Type: text/markdown.
popupNotMarkdown.description: Notice shown when the popup opens on a non-Markdown page. Preserve the <code> tags around .md and Content-Type — they style those as inline code.

footerPrefix.description: Footer label on rendered pages, before the See original / See rendered link. Keep the product name 'Markdown Viewer Ultra' in English; translate only the surrounding wording.

footerSeeOriginal.description: Footer link: switch from rendered HTML to the raw markdown source.

footerSeeRendered.description: Footer link: switch from raw source back to the rendered HTML.

popupWidthLabel.description: Section label above the content-width picker in the toolbar popup.

popupWidthFull.description: Width picker option: no max-width — content fills the viewport.
